reasoning: As of May 5, 2025, there is no evidence of China sending ground forces into Taiwan or its outlying islands, nor has the US government made any such accusation. A major amphibious invasion would require months of highly visible military preparation, which has not been reported by open-source intelligence or the US government. Most defense official warnings and timelines focus on 2027 as the earliest window of high concern. Therefore, the likelihood of a surprise invasion and subsequent US accusation within the less than two months remaining before the July 1, 2025 deadline is extremely low.
